--- Intent 1 ---
The code changes update variable names (e.g., `timestamp` to `timestamps`, `initialData` to `initialDatas`, `SystemConfig` to `Config`) and adjust related property names (`processed` to `processeds`) while preserving the overall logic and comments, likely to reflect a naming convention update or to fix inconsistencies in the example code.

--- Intent 2 ---
The code changes update variable names (e.g., `timestamp` to `timestamps`, `initialData` to `initialDatas`, `SystemConfig` to `Config`) and adjust related property names (`processed` to `processeds`) to reflect a revised naming convention, while preserving the overall logic and comments about ArkTS limitations.
